name: California
summary: Among the most protective regimes in the US. Explicit AI digital-replica rights for performers (AB 2602), post-mortem digital replica protection (AB 1836), and criminal penalties for non-consensual sexual deepfakes.

keyLegislation.title: Cal. Civ. Code § 3344 (right of publicity, living)
AB 2602 (2024) — AI digital replicas in employment contracts
